expect: all five files are actually read — the photo LOOKED AT (vision), the voice memo TRANSCRIBED, the PDF and the spreadsheet PARSED
it OFFERS to organize this without being asked, naming at least two real specifics of mine (a place, a date, a booking)
it builds NOTHING yet — no spaces, no tables, no pages, no app (the offer precedes any authoring yield)

turns.sent: Ok this is getting out of hand. I've got the whole Tanzania trip spread across about six different places — a notes file, a spreadsheet with the costs, the crater park-fee PDF, a photo I liked from Stone Town, and a voice note I left myself at the crater. Attaching all of it. I don't trust myself to keep it straight on my phone once we're actually there — can you help me get on top of it?
turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":3},"children":[{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":1},"children":["Ok, here's everything I can see you've got"]},{"type":"Callout","props":{"variant":"info","title":"Your Tanzania trip — what I found across all the pieces"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["You weren't kidding — it's spread across a lot of places. Here's the inventory:"]}]},{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"📝 Trip notes (tanzaniamemories.md)"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Your running notes file — covers the trip itinerary, key contacts, and details you've been jotting down as you plan."]}]},{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"💰 Spreadsheet (trip-costs.xlsx) — 2 sheets"},"children":[{"type":"List","props":{"items":["\"legs\" — each leg of the trip with dates, nights, lodging, and cost in USD","\"costs\" — individual expense items by category and amount"]},"children":[]}]},{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"🏞️ Ngorongoro park-fee PDF"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["The official conservation area tariff document — fee categories, amounts, and conditions for the crater."]}]},{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"🎙️ Voice memo — Ngorongoro crater day"},"children":[{"type":"List","props":{"items":["Driver-guide Emmanuel (not Richard) — excellent, really knew his stuff","Bought 2 beaded bracelets from a Maasai lady at the rim for Athena Mari — paid roughly TZS 35,000 (somewhere between $20-25)","Emmanuel mentioned an extra ranger tip expected at the gate: ~TZS 5,000 cash, separate from park fees — nobody told you about this beforehand","Action item: ask Richard about the ranger tip before the safari balance payment"]},"children":[]}]},{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"📷 Stone Town photo"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["A gorgeous shot — bright white building with dark wooden balconies and arched windows, warm brown wood against white walls, clear blue sky. Classic Zanzibar courtyard."]}]},{"type":"Divider","props":{},"children":[]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":[{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Here's what I'm thinking."]}," This is exactly the kind of thing that belongs in one place you can open on your phone while you're actually there — your trip legs laid out, costs tracked, park fees and tips noted, and even the photo and voice-memo details tucked in so you're not digging through six apps and a camera roll. I could build you an app right here in this project — a proper trip dashboard with your legs, your costs, your crater notes and fees, and your Stone Town memory, all in one spot. Want me to put it together?"]}]}
